name: claude-design-stack
description: A curated, opinionated design stack for Claude Code, plus a decision-table router that tells you (and the model) which skill to use for which task.

installs.name: impeccable
installs.summary: Anti-AI-slop frontend design skill; 23 commands (craft, shape, audit, critique, polish, typeset, animate, harden, optimize, ...).

installs.name: design-taste-frontend
installs.summary: Anti-slop core: brief -> direction -> non-template UI. Not for dashboards or data tables.

installs.name: high-end-visual-design
installs.summary: Make a site look expensive: fonts, spacing, shadows, cards, motion; kills cheap defaults.

installs.name: redesign-existing-projects
installs.summary: Audit an existing site, spot generic AI patterns, upgrade without breaking it.

installs.name: minimalist-ui
installs.summary: Minimalist editorial style: warm monochrome, type contrast, flat bento, soft pastels.

installs.name: industrial-brutalist-ui
installs.summary: Industrial brutalism: Swiss type x military terminal, rigid grids, extreme scale contrast.

installs.name: full-output-enforcement
installs.summary: Force complete code output, no placeholders; clean handling of token limits. Orthogonal to taste.

installs.name: ui-ux-pro-max
installs.summary: Searchable design DB: 50+ styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings, 161 product types, 99 UX rules, 25 chart types across 10 stacks.
installs.notes: data/ and scripts/ are symlinks upstream (install copies the real files). Search scripts need python3. Also installable via its own /plugin marketplace or uipro-cli.

optional.name: design:* (Anthropic design suite)
optional.summary: accessibility-review, design-critique, design-handoff, design-system, ux-copy, user-research, research-synthesis. Referenced by the router; install separately.

optional.name: pencil / visualize
optional.summary: pencil edits encrypted .pen design files; visualize renders inline SVG/HTML widgets in chat. Referenced by the router; available only when the MCP is connected.
